name: tier-c/haskell/03-both-files-union
description: Both cabal.project and stack.yaml present per §1.14 — emit both as evidence; package_roots[] is the union of distinct subdirs.

manifests.pkgA/pkgA.cabal:
cabal-version: 2.4
name: pkgA
version: 0.1.0.0
library
  exposed-modules: PkgA
manifests.pkgB/pkgB.cabal:
cabal-version: 2.4
name: pkgB
version: 0.1.0.0
library
  exposed-modules: PkgB
